Earth Processes · Week 4

Fluvial Processes, Oceans & Coastlines

The Amazon begins in Peru — and the Humboldt Current shapes its coast.

This page will cover Peru's river systems, the Amazon headwaters, the Humboldt Current, coastal dynamics, and the Pacific coastline.

The Amazon's headwaters originate in the Peruvian Andes
